## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `bin/loadwright validate <spec>` when changing specs or examples
- [ ] Example compile/import checks when changing docs, examples, spec, or JMX generation

## Notes

- [ ] This change keeps normal runs deterministic and does not require AI.
- [ ] This change does not include secrets, private endpoints, or proprietary JMeter plans.
